TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 503

JUDGE JOSEPH A. DESMOND, K.LEE/CLERK, P.DOWLING/CSR 09:30AM CAUSE CALLED FOR TRIAL BY JURY. TWO OUT OF SIX PLAINTIFFS, ALEXANDER KULAGIN AND VICTORIA KUDLACH, ARE PRESENT IN PRO PER. KAREN KIRBY FOR THE DEFT. THE TWO PLTFS KULAGIN AND KUDLACH DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE AGAINST THE DEFT. COURT ORDERS JUDGMENT FOR THE DEFT AND AGAINST THE REMAINING PLAINTIFFS. DEFT TO PREPARE THE JUDGMENT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE, SUBMISSION OF JUDGMENT STATUS, JUDGMENT REACHED CONTINUED TO SEP-08-1998 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR
AS TO PLTFS ALEXANDER KULAGIN AND VICTORIA KUDLACH ONLY PER THEIR REQUEST, ORDER TO DISMISS FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT CHOW, SUCHUIN HUICHUIN ON THE COMPLAINT, SAID DEFENDANT TO HAVE JUDGMENT THEREON FOR $5,790.60 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,790.60, COSTS PER COST BILL AS TO ALL PLTFS INCLUDING ALEXANDER KULAGIN AND VICTORIA KUDLACH WHO MOVED TO DISMISS THEIR ACTION. THERE WAS NO WAIVER OF COSTS.

THERE WAS NO WAIVER OF COSTS.
